So if Millicent says Alejandro lies, but Alejandro's statement is actually true, then Millicent must be lying. So Millicent is lying. Then Shalonda says Millicent lies. Therefore, if Conception says Shalonda lies, but Shalonda is actually truthful, then Conception is lying. Therefore, Conception does not tell the truth.
